M0580_WHEN_ANXIOUS (M0580) When Anxious When anxious (reported or observed). 00 = None of the time
01 = Less often than daily
02 = Daily, but not constantly
03 = All of the time
NA = NA - Patient nonresponsive. CHAR 2 x x
M0590_DP_MOOD (M0590) Depressed Mood Depressive
